problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: If Acoustic levitation for contactless manipulation is applied to chemical, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
